Our Story

Built For Champions

MYKATTU GYM was born from a single belief: every person carries the potential of a champion. Since 2016, we've been the proving ground for Bengaluru's most committed athletes, everyday warriors, and transformation seekers.

Our 15,000 sq.ft. facility at Hesaraghatta, Bengaluru fuses premium equipment with AI-powered coaching — where science meets sweat and results are non-negotiable.

⚡
AI Coaching
Personalized plans adapting in real-time to your progress and recovery.

500+ machines & free weights from top global brands.

Powered By Intelligence

AI-Powered Fitness

Train smarter with our 6-feature AI ecosystem — personalized, adaptive, and always evolving. Click any card to learn more.

🤖
AI Coach

Virtual Fitness Coach

Chat with our AI coach 24/7. Get form corrections, motivation, workout modifications, and instant answers to all your fitness questions.

Explore Feature →
📊
AI Analytics

Smart Body Analytics

AI analyzes your InBody scan, tracks weekly progress, predicts plateaus, and auto-adjusts your program for continuous gains.

Explore Feature →
🥗
AI Nutrition

Diet & Nutrition AI

Scan any meal for instant macros. Get personalized meal plans based on your goals, allergies, and food preferences — updated weekly.

Explore Feature →
⚡
AI Workout

Adaptive Workout Engine

Dynamic workout plans that evolve with your performance. Each session auto-adjusts based on recovery, energy levels, and progress data.

Explore Feature →
❤️
AI Recovery

Recovery Intelligence

AI monitors your HRV, sleep quality, and soreness levels to prescribe optimal recovery protocols and prevent overtraining injuries.

Explore Feature →
🎯
AI Goals

Goal Prediction Engine

Set your transformation goal and our AI maps the exact timeline, milestones, and strategy — with weekly recalibration.

Explore Feature →
